title: Foreign Influence Registration Scheme: how to register online
body: "The Foreign Influence Registration Scheme (FIRS) protects the safety and interests of the UK by improving the understanding of activity taking place in the UK at the instruction of a foreign state or certain foreign state‑controlled organisations. It is contained within part 4 of the National Security Act 2023.  Register with the Foreign Influence Registration Scheme.  This guidance includes how to:   submit a registration check if a registration has been made provide evidence that information should not be made public   It also details how to find more guidance and support.   You can only view and submit registrations that you have started.  The ability to view and submit registrations started by other users will be added soon.    Give feedback on the FIRS guidance.   "
